Terms & Conditions

1. The General Terms and Conditions at https://joyparkstudios.id/terms-conditions/ (“GTC”) are fully integrated and incorporated herein.
2. Capitalized words used in this Sale Order but not otherwise defined shall have the meanings ascribed to them in the GTC.
3. If there is any conflict or ambiguity between this Sale Order, the GTC and any other documents, that conflict or inconsistency will be resolved in the following
order of precedence: (a) this Sale Order; (b) Special Terms; (c) the GTC.

matched_opportunity_records.Description: Initial deal for 500 widgets. We expect follow-on business with a potential upside of 4000 additional widgets over the next 12 months.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: salesforce.com - 500 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: The deal is at 10% because they are at the sales process stage of evaluating just being converted from a lead.  No formal sales engagement has taken place yet.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: Acme - 200 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: The deal is at  50% because they are at the sales process stage of evaluating our ROI justification.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: Acme - 1,200 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: They are interested in our widgets!  The deal is at 90% because they are at the sales process stage of negotiating the finer points of a proposal that we submitted.  We are negotiating with their key decision makers and are confident that this deal will close soon.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: salesforce.com - 1,000 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: Initial deal for 5000 widgets. We expect follow-on business with a potential upside of 40000 additional widgets over the next 12 months.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: salesforce.com - 5000 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: The deal is at 60% because they are still at the sales process stage of getting buy-in from the key decision makers.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: Global Media - 400 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: The deal is at 20% because they are at the sales process stage of defining their requirements.  It is not clear whether our solutions are a good fit or not but they are willing to discuss this in detail.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: Acme - 600 Widgets

matched_opportunity_records.Description: More widgets required.  The deal is at 50% because they are still at the sales process stage of evaluating the business/value justification that we submitted.
matched_opportunity_records.Name: salesforce.com - 2,000 Widgets
